meta.title: Fayed | My Journey
meta.description: A calm patient journey home that helps you know what to do next.

hero.title: Start from the next step that fits you
hero.note: Review your next session, payments, and support from one place.

chips.supportOpen: Support is following up with you

instantBooking.heading: Active instant booking request
instantBooking.note: A request with {practitioner} is still active.

empty.heading: No upcoming sessions
empty.note: Once you book a session, it will appear here with the time and next steps.

recent.heading: Recent activity
recent.note: Quick access to your latest activity.

empty.heading: No recent activity
empty.note: Bookings, payments, and support will appear here once you use them.

support.heading: Support
support.openTicket: You still have an open support ticket connected to your account.
support.empty: If you have an issue with booking, payment, or joining a session, support can help.
support.openTicketBody: You have an open support request. You can follow the latest update here.

quickLinks.careNote: Start from the step that moves you forward.

nextSteps.unavailable: This step is not available on the web yet.

COMPLETE_PAYMENT.title: Complete pending payment
COMPLETE_PAYMENT.note: Finish this payment so your session can continue.

JOIN_UPCOMING_SESSION.title: Get ready for your upcoming session
JOIN_UPCOMING_SESSION.note: Review session details and current status.

VIEW_SUPPORT_TICKET.title: Check your support follow-up
VIEW_SUPPORT_TICKET.note: You have an open support ticket on your account.

TAKE_ASSESSMENT.title: Start a quick check-in
TAKE_ASSESSMENT.note: A short check-in can help clarify your current needs.

START_GUIDED_MATCHING.title: Start guided matching
START_GUIDED_MATCHING.note: Guided matching helps you find the right practitioner.

BOOK_NEXT_SESSION.title: Book your next session
BOOK_NEXT_SESSION.note: Browse practitioners and choose what fits your journey.

error.heading: We could not load your journey
error.note: Please try again. Your sessions and payments are still available.
